title: Crispy Chicken Fritters
description: A delicious and easy-to-make snack or appetizer, perfect for any occasion. Crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, these chicken fritters are sure to please.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
In a bowl, mix together the flour, crispy breadcrumbs, dried oregano, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
In another bowl, whisk together the greek yogurt and egg.
Add the chicken breast to the yogurt mixture and mix well.
Add the chicken mixture to the flour mixture and mix until just combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small fritters.
Carefully place the fritters into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
